one_time_description: Loss on investment in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (Brokenhead River Casino Resort Limited Partnership share of losses)
economic_notes: First Nation has a 1/7 ownership interest in Brokenhead River Casino Resort Limited Partnership. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method. Miishipaawiitik Inc. involved in East Side Road Authority contracts. Large capital projects underway including school project ($23.8M in progress), lagoon project ($16.8M), water treatment plant completed.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Four entities consolidated: Band Administration, Bulk Fuels, Health Authority, Miishipaawiitik Inc. South Beach Casino Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method (GBE). Large infrastructure capital projects in progress totalling $26.3M including school ($23.8M) and completed lagoon/water treatment. Loss on casino investment of $1,010,977 recorded. Province of Manitoba litigation: province claimed $302,989 against First Nation; First Nation counter-claimed $1,856,547. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs revenue $747,392 and South Beach Casino distribution $211,832 received but not separately shown as revenue line in income statement (casino distribution flows through investment account). ISC revenue significantly higher in prior year due to large school project funding. Net debt position of $772,613.
